message:
feat(compress): add gzip/deflate compressors and response compression middleware (asupersync-38nae)

Add GzipCompressor, DeflateCompressor, GzipDecompressor, and DeflateDecompressor
behind a 'compression' feature flag using flate2's pure-Rust miniz_oxide backend.
Add CompressionMiddleware for the web framework with Accept-Encoding negotiation,
configurable minimum body size threshold, and Vary header management.

56 new tests (42 http::compress + 14 web::compress), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,6 +94,8 @@ quic-compat = []
 http3-compat = ["quic-compat"]
 # Enable Kafka client integration via rdkafka.
 kafka = ["dep:rdkafka"]
+# Enable HTTP response compression (gzip, deflate) via flate2.
+compression = ["dep:flate2"]
 # Enable unsafe AVX2/NEON intrinsics for ~8x GF(256) throughput in RaptorQ.
 # When disabled, the safe portable SIMD fallback (std::simd) still provides ~2-3x
 # over scalar table lookups. Disable to keep the raptorq module free of unsafe code.
@@ -189,6 +191,8 @@ rdkafka = { version = "0.39", default-features = false, optional = true }
 loom = { version = "0.7", optional = true }
 # Lightweight async helpers used by web handler adapter shims.
 futures-lite = "2.6"
+# Optional gzip/deflate compression via pure-Rust miniz_oxide backend.
+flate2 = { version = "1.1", optional = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "linux")'.dependencies]
 io-uring = { version = "0.7.11", optional = true }
@@ -222,6 +226,7 @@ toml = "1.0"
 rcgen = "0.14"
 rayon = "1.11"
 serde_yaml = "0.9"
+flate2 = "1.1"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "phase0_baseline"
